message:
Show pulsing "running…" cells while a bench is in flight

Both playgrounds previously sat with all cells at "—" for ~1-3 seconds
during the auto-run before any numbers landed. New visitors couldn't
tell the difference between "page is broken" and "warmup pass is in
progress".

At the start of every runBench/runAll, replace each metric cell's
text with a pulsing italic "running…" (cell-pulse keyframes, 1.2s
fade in/out). Cells transition to the actual number + win/lose
styling when the run completes. Verified in headless Chromium:
all three protocol columns show "running…" between auto-run start
and first results.
